description:
Join us on Wednesday, May 27, from 4-7 PM at Whispering Vine South Creek for a West Coast Cabernet tasting featuring four rich, structured reds from Napa Valley, Alexander Valley, Walla Walla Valley and Paso Robles.

Tasting Fee: $40 per person

Featured Wines:

  • Mount Veeder Winery Cabernet Sauvignon 2023 - $49.99 | Winery $70
  • Jordan Cabernet Sauvignon 2022 - $49.99 | Winery $60
  • Bledsoe Family Winery Cabernet Sauvignon 2022 - $49.99 - Wine Spectator 94
  • My Favorite Neighbor Cabernet Sauvignon 2022 - $29.99 | Winery $50
title: West Coast Cabs Tasting
